installmentPaymentData.installmentType.description: Type of installment. The value of `installmentType` should be **IssuerFinanced**.

installmentPaymentData.option[itemNr].fi.description: First Installment Amount in minor units.

installmentPaymentData.option[itemNr].in.description: Installment fee amount in minor units.
Interest rate for the installment period.

installmentPaymentData.option[itemNr].ma.description: Maximum number of installments possible for this payment.

installmentPaymentData.option[itemNr].mi.description: Minimum number of installments possible for this payment.

installmentPaymentData.option[itemNr].nu.description: Total number of installments possible for this payment.

installmentPaymentData.option[itemNr].su.description: Subsequent Installment Amount in minor units.

installments.value.description:
The number of installments that the payment amount should be charged with.

Example: 5
> Only relevant for card payments in countries that support installments.
